arts.ttl: Arne Slot not convinced top-eight Champions League finish is advantage in league
arts.sum: The Premier League leaders, four points clear with a game in hand, are also currently top of the Champions League table after five successive wins.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister backs 'legend of the club' Mohamed Salah to sign new Liverpool contract
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister hopes Mohamed Salah can stay at Liverpool for the rest of his career, describing his team-mate as "a legend of the club"

arts.ttl: Arne Slot throws down gauntlet to Alisson in Liverpool battle with Caoimhin Kelleher
arts.sum: Liverpool could welcome back their number one goalkeeper into the side to face Girona in the Champions League but Alisson's understudy Caoimhin Kelleher has been performing superbly in his absence

arts.ttl: What happened at airport speaks volumes about Liverpool as European impact on title race made clear
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot speaks ahead of the Champions League clash in Girona as the impact on the Premier League title race

arts.ttl: Ryan Gravenberch makes Liverpool fitness claim and responds to Toni Kroos comparisons
arts.sum: Ryan Gravenberch speaks ahead of Liverpool's Champions League trip to Girona on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: Liverpool given boost with Alisson set for Champions League return
arts.sum: The Brazilian goalkeeper has missed 11 matches with a hamstring injury

arts.ttl: Alisson return confirmed but not without Arne Slot warning for Liverpool goalkeeper
arts.sum: Alisson has been told he has a tough act to follow when he returns for Liverpool in Girona

arts.ttl: Liverpool star makes transfer admission as Arne Slot told conditions for move
arts.sum: Liverpool star Alexis Mac Allister has opened the door to a move to Spain one day after impressing for Arne Slot's team this season

arts.ttl: Liverpool star sets off alarm bells with honest transfer admission
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister has admitted that he is planning to move to Spain before the end of his career. Speaking to Madrid-based AS, Mac Allister has admitted that he would love to play in Spain someday.

arts.ttl: What Alexis Mac Allister has said about leaving Liverpool in the future – he could follow another Reds star
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister has hinted at a potential future away from Liverpool by revealing his ambition to play in La Liga. Liverpool are having a...
